void.string: <process description="modelName=com.landray.kmss.km.review.model.KmReviewTemplate&modelKey=reviewMainDoc&templateId=route-paired-template&lbpmTmpId=route-paired-lbpm" fdId="route-paired-process" linesIndex="6" nodesIndex="7" notifyType="todo"> <nodes> <startNode id="N1" name="Start" x="100" y="40"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="route-reviewer" handlerNames="Route Reviewer" handlerSelectType="org" id="N2" name="Review" x="100" y="100"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="$组织架构.根据登录名取用户$($fd_login_name$)" handlerNames="$组织架构.根据登录名取用户$($Login Name$)" handlerSelectType="formula" id="N4" name="Login-name Review" x="100" y="160"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="$部门领导.根据部门编号获取部门领导$($fd_department_no$)" handlerNames="$部门领导.根据部门编号获取部门领导$($Department No$)" handlerSelectType="formula" id="N5" name="Department-leader Review" x="100" y="220"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="$docCreator$" handlerNames="$docCreator$" handlerSelectType="formula" id="N6" name="Document-creator Review" x="100" y="280"/> <reviewNode handlerIds="$fd_login_name$" handlerNames="$Login Name$" handlerSelectType="formula" id="N7" name="Form-field Review" x="100" y="340"/> <endNode id="N3" name="End" x="100" y="400"/> </nodes> <lines> <line endNodeId="N2" id="L1" startNodeId="N1"/> <line endNodeId="N4" id="L2" startNodeId="N2"/> <line endNodeId="N5" id="L3" startNodeId="N4"/> <line endNodeId="N6" id="L4" startNodeId="N5"/> <line endNodeId="N7" id="L5" startNodeId="N6"/> <line endNodeId="N3" id="L6" startNodeId="N7"/> </lines> </process>
